title: lobelia davidi var. handelii
intro: Lobelia davidi var. handelii, also known as the "Indian tobacco", is a plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is a variety of the Lobelia davidi species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia davidi var. handelii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, as well as its ability to act as a sedative and antispasmodic. Lobelia davidi var. handelii can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried herb for medicinal use, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
